title: UAT Enterprise System Specification
authority: The machine-readable files in this manifest and docs/UAT_ENTERPRISE_SYSTEM_SPECIFICATION.md define the target contract. Repository tests enforce specification integrity only until the corresponding runtime acceptance gate is passed.
non_claims: This specification does not establish that the current repository is production-grade.
This specification does not establish a venture success probability.
This specification does not authorize autonomous spending, contracting, publication, incorporation, hiring, regulated activity, or production deployment.
Passing specification-integrity tests does not prove runtime security, reliability, legal compliance, or commercial viability.
